neighborhoods.name: Volcan Centro
neighborhoods.description: Highland town on the slopes of Baru volcano with cool climate, orchid farms, and agricultural markets
neighborhoods.character: Highland town, volcano slopes, cool climate, agriculture

housing.predominantType: Houses and small apartments near the town center

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Volcán. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Paso Ancho
neighborhoods.description: Uphill residential area above Volcan with mountain views and strawberry farms
neighborhoods.character: Uphill residential, strawberry farms, mountain views
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Volcán's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Cerra Punta
neighborhoods.description: Highest settlement in Panama with vegetable farms, cool mist, and very affordable living
neighborhoods.character: Highest town, vegetable farming, misty and cool
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Nueva Suiza / Highland Communities
neighborhoods.description: Areas named by Swiss settlers with coffee farms and an established highland expat community
neighborhoods.character: Swiss-named, coffee farms, highland expat community

housing.predominantType: Custom houses, coffee farm properties, and gated homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
